heading: Repealed. , ,Pub. L. 91–606, title III, § 302(2)84 Stat. 1759Dec. 31, 1970
label: 1855aa to 1855ii Repealed. , ,Pub. L. 91–606, title III, § 302(2)84 Stat. 1759Dec. 31, 1970
notes: , §§ 1, 14, , , 1321, set out as notes under , gave the name “Disaster Relief Act of 1966” to , and provided for effective date of such act.Pub. L. 89–76980 Stat. 1316section 1855aa of this titlePub. L. 89–769Nov. 6, 1966

Section 1855bb, , , , called for rescheduling and refinancing of Federal loans in event of a major disaster. See and , Agriculture.Pub. L. 89–769, § 3(a)80 Stat. 1316section 3538 of this titlesection 912a of Title 7Nov. 6, 1966

Section 1855cc, , , , authorized Secretary of Defense to make available facilities of civil defense communications system in case of imminent natural disasters.Pub. L. 89–769, § 580 Stat. 1317Nov. 6, 1966

Section 1855dd, , , , set out order of priorities to be followed in processing applications for public facility and public housing assistance in major disaster areas.Pub. L. 89–769, § 880 Stat. 1320Nov. 6, 1966

Section 1855ee, , , , provided for reimbursement of costs of reconstruction of public facilities, eligible costs, and agencies and parties entitled to reimbursement.Pub. L. 89–769, § 980 Stat. 1320Nov. 6, 1966

Section 1855ff, , , , directed department heads to administer programs covering major disasters so that there is no duplication of efforts between various programs.Pub. L. 89–769, § 1080 Stat. 1320Nov. 6, 1966
Section 1855gg, , , , provided for extension of time to leaseholders, etc., of public lands in disaster areas.Pub. L. 89–769, § 1180 Stat. 1321Nov. 6, 1966
Section 1855hh, , , , directed the President to coordinate and review all assistance programs.Pub. L. 89–769, § 1280 Stat. 1321Nov. 6, 1966

Section 1855ii, , , , called for a study of air operation facilities for disaster assistance and for a report of findings of such study to Congress with recommendations by .Pub. L. 89–769, § 1380 Stat. 1321Nov. 6, 1966May 6, 1967
For provisions relating to disaster relief, see section 5121 et seq. of this title.
